notes.author: hello@unclesam.tours
notes.body:
--- Inclusions: --- 
Scheduled access only with Group tours ( Exterior and Interior)
Guided tour with an English-speaking guide
Regular standard access to the Cathedral (for semi-private tours)
Access to both exterior and interior areas of Notre-Dame Cathedral, depending on the chosen option
Small-group sizes: Max 25 guests for group tours
Max 5 guests for semi-private tours
Guaranteed to skip the lines

--- Booking languages: --- 
GUIDE : English

activity.title: Experience Notre-Dame: Interior or Exterior Tour with Access
activity.description:
Explore the newly reopened Notre-Dame Cathedral with or without a licensed guide. Admire Gothic arches, stained glass, and sacred artworks.

Discover 850 years of history—from medieval Paris to Napoleon’s coronation and Victor Hugo’s novel.

Choose between two options:
• An exterior tour with cathedral entry, where you explore the interior freely after an introduction.
• Or an interior guided visit, led by a certified professional officially authorized to interpret France’s national monuments.
(maximum 25 people per group for either option)

Enjoy a smooth, organized experience via the official group entry—focus on history, architecture, and the spirit of this sacred site.

Important: As Notre-Dame is an active place of worship, all visitors are expected to show respect for the sacred environment.
Please note: No weapons, food, pets, phone calls, or large bags allowed.
Modest attire is required — no short skirts or shorts, sleeveless, low-cut, or offensive tops. .

startPoints.title: Statue de Charlemagne et ses leudes

activity.included:
Timed Entry only with Group tours
Radios only with Group Tours
activity.excluded:
Tips
No short skirts/shorts, sleeveless/low-cut/offensive tops.
The cathedral is a place of worship,&really strict about dressing, guest have to be dressed modestly
activity.attention:
• Not suitable for pets
  • No public transportation nearby
  • Infants must not sit on laps
  • Infant seats unavailable
  • Wheelchair accessible
  • The entrance to Notre-Dame Cathedral in Paris is free and open to all. The services offered are independent of access to the interior of the building.
  • Your guide will be waiting for you beside the Statue of Charlemagne, located on the right-hand side of Notre-Dame Cathedral when facing the main entrance. Look for the sign that says “Uncle Sam Tours.” You can also type “Statue de Charlemagne et ses leudes” into Google Maps.

rates.title: Notre-Dame de Paris Tour with Reserved Timed Entry
rates.description: Exterior and Interior tour with Scheduled Reserved Entry

textItems.title: Notre-Dame de Paris Tour with Reserved Timed Entry
textItems.description: Exterior and Interior tour with Scheduled Reserved Entry

rates.title: Notre Dame Semi Private Max 5
rates.description: Notre Dame semi private exterior and interior tour with standard public entry.

textItems.title: Notre Dame Semi Private Max 5
textItems.description: Notre Dame semi private exterior and interior tour with standard public entry.

activity.ticketMsg:
Your guide will be waiting for you beside the Statue of Charlemagne, located on the right-hand side of Notre-Dame Cathedral when facing the main entrance. Look for the sign that says “Uncle Sam Tours.” 
You can also type “Statue de Charlemagne et ses leudes” into Google Maps.

agendaItems.body:
Explore the newly reopened Notre-Dame Cathedral with or without a licensed guide. 
Admire the soaring Gothic arches, radiant stained glass, and sacred artworks. 
Learn about 850 years of history, from medieval Paris to Napoleon’s coronation and Victor Hugo’s famous novel. 
Choose a self-guided group entry or a guided visit led by a certified professional guide (up to 25 people), officially authorized to interpret France’s historic monuments.

Enjoy a smooth and organized experience via the official group rentry, allowing you to focus on history, architecture, and the spirit of this sacred space.

L’entrée à la Cathédrale Notre-Dame de Paris est libre et gratuite. Les prestations proposées sont indépendantes de l’entrée dans l’édifice.

Entry to Notre-Dame Cathedral is free and open to all. The services offered are independent from entrance to the site.

location.wholeAddress: 6 Parvis Notre-Dame, Place Jean-Paul II, 75004 Paris

activity.title: Louvre Highlights & Mona Lisa Guided Experience
activity.description:
Our Louvre tour offers an unforgettable experience tailored to travelers who want more than just a visit.

Skip-the-Line Access: Save precious time with priority entry, avoiding long queues.

Expert Local Licensed Guides: Led by passionate art historians who bring the masterpieces to life with engaging stories and insights.

Custom Itineraries: See the Louvre’s iconic works like the Mona Lisa and Venus de Milo, plus hidden gems often missed by other tours.

Small Group Sizes: Enjoy a more personal and interactive experience in a limited group size
activity.included:
Reserved access to Louvre Museum
English-speaking expert guide
Entrance ticket and reservation fee for the Louvre
activity.attention:
• Not wheelchair accessible
  • Infants must not sit on laps
  • Infant seats unavailable
  • Not recommended for people with heart conditions
  • 48.8610417 N, 2.3349778 E Please enter these coordinates on Google Maps for the exact location. Please look for the guide holding a sign. Meet the tour guide near the equestrian statue near the iconic glass Pyramid of the Louvre Museum. Please arrive 15 minutes early.

tripadvisorReview.name: Louvre Highlights & Mona Lisa Guided Tour
tripadvisorReview.description: The Louvre’s collection spans worlds from ancient Egypt to Renaissance Italy and 19th-century France and you could spend days exploring and still not see it all. Hit the highlights without sacrificing swathes of your vacation on this tour with an art historian guide. As well as icons like the Mona Lisa and Venus de Milo, see gems that larger tours miss.

activity.ticketMsg:
48.8610417 N, 2.3349778 E
Please enter these coordinates on Google Maps for the exact location. 
Please look for the guide holding a sign. Meet the tour guide near the equestrian statue near the iconic glass Pyramid of the Louvre Museum. Please arrive 15 minutes early.

agendaItems.body: Embark on an exclusive guided tour of the Louvre Museum, home to some of the most famous and celebrated artworks in history. Discover the stories behind timeless masterpieces like the Mona Lisa, the Venus de Milo, and many more, as your expert guide takes you through this iconic museum. Explore the rich history and cultural significance of each piece in a way that brings them to life, making your visit a truly unforgettable experience.

activityBookings.rateTitle: Eiffel Tower Climbing Tour with Summit Access

activity.title: Eiffel Tower Climbing Tour with Optional Summit with Elevator
activity.description:
Don’t miss out on this unforgettable experience at one of the world’s most iconic landmarks! Our exclusive Eiffel Tower tour invites you to climb the stairs to the 2nd floor alongside a professional guide who will share captivating stories about the tower’s history and the breathtaking views of Paris. With a small group setting, you'll enjoy a more personal and engaging experience away from the crowds.

You’ll also have the option to upgrade your ticket to include access to the summit via elevator for an even more spectacular view. Please note that summit access is managed by the Eiffel Tower authorities and may be closed without prior notice due to weather or operational reasons. If the summit is closed on the day of your tour, a refund for the summit portion will be provided.

Book now for an unforgettable adventure in the heart of Paris!
activity.included:
Professional guide
Entrance tickets to the 1st and 2nd floors of the Eiffel Tower
Fully guided stair climb to the 2nd floor
Summit access by elevator (if selected)
Entry/Admission to the Eiffel Tower
activity.attention:
• Not wheelchair accessible
  • Infants must not sit on laps
  • Infant seats unavailable
  • Not recommended for pregnant travelers
  • Not recommended for people with heart conditions
  • 2 Avenue Octave Gréard, Paris PLEASE NOTE: The meeting point is NOT at the Eiffel Tower. The meeting point is located at 2 Avenue Octave Gréard, Paris, it is a group tour and the group departs together. You may experience waiting times to enter the Eiffel Tower, which can vary depending on the season and time of day; queues for lifts and mandatory security checks typically range from 30 minutes up to 1–2 hours. For further information about your visit to the Eiffel Tower, please consult the official visitor’s practical guide: https://www.toureiffel.paris/en/news/visit/visitors-practical-guide

tripadvisorReview.name: Eiffel Tower Climbing Tour with Optional Summit with Elevator
tripadvisorReview.description: Don’t miss out on this unforgettable experience at one of the world’s most iconic landmarks! Our exclusive Eiffel Tower tour invites you to climb the stairs to the 2nd floor alongside a professional guide who will share captivating stories about the tower’s history and the breathtaking views of Paris. With a small group setting, you'll enjoy a more personal and engaging experience away from the crowds.  You’ll also have the option to upgrade your ticket to include access to the summit via elevator for an even more spectacular view.  Book now for an unforgettable adventure in the heart of Paris!

rates.title: Eiffel Tower Climbing Tour with Summit Access

textItems.title: Eiffel Tower Climbing Tour with Summit Access

activity.ticketMsg:
2 Avenue Octave Gréard, Paris

PLEASE NOTE: The meeting point is NOT at the Eiffel Tower. The meeting point is located at 2 Avenue Octave Gréard, Paris, it is a group tour and the group departs together.

You may experience waiting times to enter the Eiffel Tower, which can vary depending on the season and time of day; queues for lifts and mandatory security checks typically range from 30 minutes up to 1–2 hours.

For further information about your visit to the Eiffel Tower, please consult the official visitor’s practical guide: https://www.toureiffel.paris/en/news/visit/visitors-practical-guide

agendaItems.body: At the Eiffel Tower, travelers will embark on a guided ascent, learning fascinating details about the tower's history and architecture along the way. As you climb, you'll reach the first level, where you can walk on a thrilling glass floor, offering a unique perspective of the city below. Continuing to the second tier, enjoy stunning views of Paris from above. For those who choose the upgrade, the experience can be extended to the summit, where even more breathtaking panoramic vistas await.

So far, Headout has served more than 25 million guests from 196 countries across 81 destinations.

sellerInvoice.title: W - Louvre Semi Private Tour (Louvre Semi Private Tour) - Sat, March 21 2026 - 12:15 PM

product.title: W - Louvre Semi Private Tour

activity.title: W - Louvre Semi Private Tour
activity.description:
Join a semi private guided tour of the Louvre Museum, limited to six people, so you can explore at a comfortable pace with personal attention from your guide. You enter with skip the line access, saving time and avoiding confusion at one of the world’s busiest museums.

Your guide leads you through the museum’s key areas and explains how the Louvre grew from a royal palace into a major public museum. You see the Louvre Pyramid and learn how it reshaped the visitor experience. Inside, you focus on essential works that help you understand the museum without feeling overwhelmed.

You view famous sculptures such as the Venus de Milo and the Winged Victory of Samothrace, with clear explanations of their history and significance. You also stop at the Mona Lisa, where your guide helps you make sense of its fame and artistic value.

The tour continues with large scale paintings including The Coronation of Napoleon, The Raft of Medusa, and Liberty Leading the People. You also see Michelangelo’s sculptures, the Dying Slave and the Rebellious Slave, with guidance on how to read their form and meaning.

This semi private tour suits you if you want structure, clear explanations, and time to ask questions. You leave with a solid understanding of the Louvre’s main works and practical tips for continuing your visit on your own if you choose.

startPoints.title: Louis XIV sous les traits de Marcus Curtius (copie)

address.addressLine1: Cour Napoléon et Pyramide du Louvre

English-speaking Expert guide
Entrance ticket and reservation fee for the Louvre
Guaranteed skip the lines
The Mona Lisa and other famous paintings and sculptures

comboParts.title: Louvre Highlights & Mona Lisa Guided Experience

activity.ticketMsg: The tour guide will provide you with the tickets

agendaItems.body: On this captivating tour of the Louvre Museum, travelers will explore some of the most iconic masterpieces in art history. Highlights of the tour include the ancient Great Sphinx of Tanis, the graceful Venus de Milo, and the awe-inspiring Winged Victory of Samothrace. Additionally, guests will marvel at world-renowned paintings such as Leonardo da Vinci’s Mona Lisa, the powerful Coronation of Napoleon, The Raft of Medusa, Liberty Leading the People, and Michelangelo’s Dying Slave and Rebellious Slave. Each work tells a unique story, offering a blend of history, culture, and artistic brilliance.

A modern architectural masterpiece, the Louvre Pyramid serves as the grand entrance to the Louvre Museum. Designed by renowned architect I.M. Pei, this glass and metal pyramid stands in striking contrast to the historic grandeur of the surrounding Louvre Palace. Visitors are captivated by its sleek design and the way it elegantly reflects the surrounding structures. The pyramid’s transparent beauty offers a breathtaking prelude to the vast collection of art waiting inside.

Located just beneath the Louvre Museum, the Carrousel of the Louvre is an upscale underground shopping and dining area. Known for its iconic inverted pyramid, this elegant mall offers a mix of luxury shops, cultural boutiques, and cafes. It provides a relaxing space for visitors to take a break, shop for souvenirs, or admire the architecture before or after their museum experience. The Carrousel adds a modern and convenient dimension to your Louvre visit.

product.title: Louvre Highlights & Mona Lisa Guided Experience

activityBookings.rateTitle: Eiffel Tower Climbing Tour with Summit Access

activity.title: Eiffel Tower Climbing Tour with Optional Summit with Elevator
activity.description:
Don’t miss out on this unforgettable experience at one of the world’s most iconic landmarks! Our exclusive Eiffel Tower tour invites you to climb the stairs to the 2nd floor alongside a professional guide who will share captivating stories about the tower’s history and the breathtaking views of Paris. With a small group setting, you'll enjoy a more personal and engaging experience away from the crowds.

You’ll also have the option to upgrade your ticket to include access to the summit via elevator for an even more spectacular view. Please note that summit access is managed by the Eiffel Tower authorities and may be closed without prior notice due to weather or operational reasons. If the summit is closed on the day of your tour, a refund for the summit portion will be provided.

Book now for an unforgettable adventure in the heart of Paris!
activity.included:
Professional guide
Entrance tickets to the 1st and 2nd floors of the Eiffel Tower
Fully guided stair climb to the 2nd floor
Summit access by elevator (if selected)
Entry/Admission to the Eiffel Tower
activity.attention:
• Not wheelchair accessible
  • Infants must not sit on laps
  • Infant seats unavailable
  • Not recommended for pregnant travelers
  • Not recommended for people with heart conditions
  • 2 Avenue Octave Gréard, Paris PLEASE NOTE: The meeting point is NOT at the Eiffel Tower. The meeting point is located at 2 Avenue Octave Gréard, Paris, it is a group tour and the group departs together. You may experience waiting times to enter the Eiffel Tower, which can vary depending on the season and time of day; queues for lifts and mandatory security checks typically range from 30 minutes up to 1–2 hours. For further information about your visit to the Eiffel Tower, please consult the official visitor’s practical guide: https://www.toureiffel.paris/en/news/visit/visitors-practical-guide

agendaItems.body: At the Eiffel Tower, travelers will embark on a guided ascent, learning fascinating details about the tower's history and architecture along the way. As you climb, you'll reach the first level, where you can walk on a thrilling glass floor, offering a unique perspective of the city below. Continuing to the second tier, enjoy stunning views of Paris from above. For those who choose the upgrade, the experience can be extended to the summit, where even more breathtaking panoramic vistas await.

product.title: Experience Notre-Dame: Interior or Exterior Tour with Access

activityBookings.rateTitle: Notre-Dame de Paris Tour with Reserved Timed Entry

activity.title: Experience Notre-Dame: Interior or Exterior Tour with Access
activity.description:
Explore the newly reopened Notre-Dame Cathedral with or without a licensed guide. Admire Gothic arches, stained glass, and sacred artworks.

Discover 850 years of history—from medieval Paris to Napoleon’s coronation and Victor Hugo’s novel.

Choose between two options:
• An exterior tour with cathedral entry, where you explore the interior freely after an introduction.
• Or an interior guided visit, led by a certified professional officially authorized to interpret France’s national monuments.
(maximum 25 people per group for either option)

Enjoy a smooth, organized experience via the official group entry—focus on history, architecture, and the spirit of this sacred site.

Important: As Notre-Dame is an active place of worship, all visitors are expected to show respect for the sacred environment.
Please note: No weapons, food, pets, phone calls, or large bags allowed.
Modest attire is required — no short skirts or shorts, sleeveless, low-cut, or offensive tops. .

startPoints.title: Statue de Charlemagne et ses leudes

activity.included:
Timed Entry only with Group tours
Radios only with Group Tours
activity.excluded:
Tips
No short skirts/shorts, sleeveless/low-cut/offensive tops.
The cathedral is a place of worship,&really strict about dressing, guest have to be dressed modestly
activity.attention:
• Not suitable for pets
  • No public transportation nearby
  • Infants must not sit on laps
  • Infant seats unavailable
  • Wheelchair accessible
  • The entrance to Notre-Dame Cathedral in Paris is free and open to all. The services offered are independent of access to the interior of the building.
  • Your guide will be waiting for you beside the Statue of Charlemagne, located on the right-hand side of Notre-Dame Cathedral when facing the main entrance. Look for the sign that says “Uncle Sam Tours.” You can also type “Statue de Charlemagne et ses leudes” into Google Maps.

agendaItems.body:
Explore the newly reopened Notre-Dame Cathedral with or without a licensed guide. 
Admire the soaring Gothic arches, radiant stained glass, and sacred artworks. 
Learn about 850 years of history, from medieval Paris to Napoleon’s coronation and Victor Hugo’s famous novel. 
Choose a self-guided group entry or a guided visit led by a certified professional guide (up to 25 people), officially authorized to interpret France’s historic monuments.

Enjoy a smooth and organized experience via the official group rentry, allowing you to focus on history, architecture, and the spirit of this sacred space.

L’entrée à la Cathédrale Notre-Dame de Paris est libre et gratuite. Les prestations proposées sont indépendantes de l’entrée dans l’édifice.

Entry to Notre-Dame Cathedral is free and open to all. The services offered are independent from entrance to the site.

location.wholeAddress: 6 Parvis Notre-Dame, Place Jean-Paul II, 75004 Paris
